meta_title: Furniture Store Website — Online Catalog | Promto
meta_description: Create a furniture store website with catalog, interior photos, and online ordering. No programmers. Attract furniture buyers online.
h1: Furniture Store Website — Beautiful Online Catalog
og_description: Furniture store website with beautiful catalog, interior photos, and online inquiries. Create without code on Promto.
hero_title: Furniture Store Website — Beautiful Online Catalog
hero_subtitle: Showcase furniture at its best — quality photos and convenient catalog attract buyers.
hero_placeholder: Describe the website for your business...

advantages.title: Beautiful Furniture Gallery
advantages.description: Large photos in interiors, detailed shots, and 360° view — buyers fall in love with the product.

advantages.title: Parameter Filtering
advantages.description: Buyers filter by style, material, color, and size — quickly find what they need.

advantages.title: Online Inquiry and Measurement
advantages.description: Form to request a measurer or purchase inquiry — directly from the product card.

advantages.title: Online Payment
advantages.description: Accept prepayment and full payment online, reducing customer drop-off.

advantages.title: Launch in 5 Minutes
advantages.description: Describe the furniture store — AI will create the catalog structure and design for your niche.

advantages.title: SEO for Furniture
advantages.description: Category and product pages optimized for furniture search in your city.

how_it_works.title: Describe the Store and Assortment
how_it_works.description: Specify furniture style and categories — AI will create a suitable catalog with needed filters.

how_it_works.title: Upload Photos and Fill Cards
how_it_works.description: Add furniture photos in interiors, dimensions, materials, and prices.

how_it_works.title: Launch and Receive Inquiries
how_it_works.description: Publish the site — buyers will find furniture in search and submit inquiries online.

faq.question: How do I show furniture in different colors on the site?
faq.answer: In the product card, add color or material variants with separate photos for each.

faq.question: Can I add 3D visualization or AR viewing?
faq.answer: Advanced plans include integration with 3D viewers for furniture.

faq.question: How do I accept inquiries for custom furniture?
faq.answer: Add a form with fields for dimensions, materials, and preferences — inquiries come to your email.

faq.question: Can I add delivery and assembly terms?
faq.answer: Yes, delivery and assembly section is a standard block for furniture stores in Promto.

faq.question: How much does a furniture store website cost?
faq.answer: Basic catalog is free. Extended functionality and custom domain on paid plans.

faq.question: How quickly will buyers find my site in search?
faq.answer: Promto SEO optimization ensures search engine indexing within a few days of publishing.

cta_mid_subtitle: A beautiful online catalog is the best salesperson for your furniture.
cta_final_title: Your Furniture Deserves a Beautiful Website
cta_final_subtitle: Create a furniture store website for free with Promto.
